title: Failure
content:
Farewell, O Arm of the Lord!
        Man who hated the sword,
        Yet struck and spared not the thing abhorred!
        Farewell, O word of the Word!
        Man who knew no failure
        But the failure of the Lord!
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Failure"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
